sizing_rule.note: Risk 3% of account equity per position; position size = floor((account_equity × 0.03) / price_risk_per_unit). Constraints: max 8x total leverage, max 8 concurrent positions.

source_rule_text: A trader should size each position by calculating the maximum acceptable loss in dollars, then divide it by the price risk per unit to determine contract quantity, ensuring leverage and total portfolio exposure remain visible and controlled.
